description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a right-hand chaise, upholstered in a light gray fabric. The sofa features three seat cushions and three backrest cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be attached. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, with a subtle decorative channeling pattern on the exterior sides. The legs are short, block-style, and slightly recessed, finished in a dark color that contrasts with the upholstery. The backrest is straight and continuous, matching the height of the armrests, and the overall design is sleek and contemporary. The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte finish and minimal visible texture.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa in light gray fabric with a right-hand chaise, straight padded armrests, and a sleek, solid upholstery finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, and the right-hand chaise extension.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, padded armrest and the decorative channeling pattern on the exterior.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the uniform height of the back and armrests.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the left armrest and the full length of the chaise section.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all attached and arranged in a sectional L-shape with a right-hand chaise.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with subtle channeling detail on the exterior sides.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners and slightly recessed, with a dark finish and minimal visual prominence.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest at uniform height, segmented into three attached cushions with no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and subtle channeling on the armrest exteriors; no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
